parameters.query:
INSERT INTO client_access_tokens (project_id, client_id, purpose, expires_at, notes)
SELECT $1::uuid, p.client_id, $2, now() + ($3::int || ' days')::interval, $4
  FROM projects p WHERE p.id = $1::uuid
RETURNING id, token, project_id, client_id, purpose, expires_at;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status:'created', token_id: $json.token_id, token: $json.token, project_id: $json.project_id, purpose: $json.purpose, expires_at: $json.expires_at, urls: $json.urls}) }}
